titleZh: 公司法中的股东权利保护研究
titleEn: Research on the Protection of Shareholders' Rights in Company Law
abstractZh: 梳理股东权利体系与司法救济的制度演进，重点关注表决、盈余分配和派生诉讼等核心议题。
abstractEn: Traces reforms and enforcement structures around shareholder rights, focusing on voting, dividend-related rights and derivative enforcement.
